title: Spec Kit auto-commit stages the entire worktree with git add .
source: Local Spec Kit command or hook execution with uncommitted repository contents present
sink: git add . followed by git commit
impact: Unreviewed and unignored local files, including sensitive configuration not covered by .gitignore, can be swept into a commit during enabled Spec Kit workflows
discovered_by: tests-specs-tooling subagent Confucius plus parent validation
